design.productInfo: It has a spacious compartment to fit everything you need, with a secure zip closure to keep your belongings safe. How cute (and realistic) is this cat-shaped bag, with green eyes, a heart-shaped nose, irresistible ears, whiskers, and a little pink yarn ball! We think Mimi might be our new favourite furry friend—shhh, don’t tell Vinnie. We wouldn’t want a catfight!

design.name: Tick Tock Clock Shop Carriage Clock Bag
design.productInfo: Printed and embossed vegan leather Antique gold closing clasp Antique gold hardware Comfortable handle Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap 1 main compartment 1 inside open pocket Fully lined with iconic Vendula London lining   *The clock on this bag works with an AA battery *Once the protective plastic has been removed from the clock, it is no longer returnable *Make sure to look after your bag and avoid scratching the watch faces. IMPORTANT - Please make sure you want to keep the product before removing the protective plastic from the clock faces. Once removed, we can no longer accept a return of the item.   Battery Warning and Safety Instructions Battery Type: Use only the specified battery type. Handling: Do not open, disassemble, or service the battery. Keep away from children and seek medical help if swallowed. Avoid water and extreme temperatures. Disposal: Dispose of used batteries properly. Do not throw them in fire or with household waste. Recycle per local regulations. Performance: Battery life varies. Check and replace as needed for optimal performance. Notice: Improper handling, use, or disposal may cause damage or injury. Follow all safety instructions.
